claim: Knockout proximal tubule-specific deletion of the BMP receptor Alk3 causes fibrosis.
evidence_sentences: We also found that its deletion in the tubular epithelium leads to enhanced TGF-β1-Smad family member 3 (Smad3) signaling, epithelial damage and fibrosis, suggesting a protective role for Alk3-mediated signaling in the kidney.
